positive: A mystical bioluminescent forest scene, designed for apparel printing. The central composition features towering, stylized trees with glowing, fractal-like canopies and roots intertwining with glowing geometric pathways. Incorporate silhouettes of woodland spirits and stylized fauna (deer, moths) integrated into the foliage. The aesthetic should be a mix of neo-tribal, art-deco, and ethereal watercolor style, emphasizing high contrast and clean lines. Use a deep midnight blue, electric cyan, and vibrant emerald green color palette with subtle pops of cosmic violet. The composition must be perfectly centered, allowing for easy cropping and print scalability, with crisp edges and strong contrast ideal for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low contrast, gradient fade, signature, watermark, text, letters, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy composition, clutter, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, celebrity, cartoon, sketch, grayscale
